thread.title: Priyanka Gandhi's Wayanad Victory: A Key Milestone for Congress, Says Himachal CM Sukhu | Shimla News - Times of India
thread.title_full: Priyanka Gandhi's Wayanad Victory: A Key Milestone for Congress, Says Himachal CM Sukhu | Shimla News - Times of India

author: TNN
title: Priyanka Gandhi's Wayanad Victory: A Key Milestone for Congress, Says Himachal CM Sukhu | Shimla News - Times of India
text: Shimla: Himachal Pradesh chief minister Sukhvinder Singh Sukhu on Saturday congratulated Congress general secretary Priyanka Gandhi for her victory in the Wayanad Lok Sabha bypoll.Sukhu said the record-breaking win in Wayanad marked a significant milestone in Priyanka’s electoral journey and it would further strengthen the Congress party. He also congratulated senior leaders and party workers for their success in the Jharkhand assembly elections, hailing their dedication and hard work.The CM, meanwhile, criticised the BJP for engaging in obstructionist rather than cooperative politics in Himachal Pradesh. “The BJP evades addressing public concerns and avoids discussing their five-year performance. Instead, they divert attention to matters like toilet tax and samosas,” he said. Sukhu further said the public deserved to know why the standards of education and healthcare declined during the BJP regime. He said his govt was committed to fulfilling all its promises and leading Himachal on the path of development.The CM said the BJP in Himachal was divided into five factions each led by J P Nadda, Anurag Thakur, Jairam Thakur, Rajeev Bindal, and a group of former Congress members who joined the saffron party and were now referred to as the “East India Company”.Sukhu said the opposition failed to engage in policy-based criticism and was rather targeting him personally. “Despite their efforts, the current state govt is steadfast in its commitment to advancing Himachal Pradesh on the path of development,” he said. We also published the following articles recentlySukhu-led Congress govt has destroyed Himachal: BJP's Jairam Thakur after court attaches Himachal BhawanFormer Himachal Pradesh Chief Minister Jairam Thakur has sharply criticized the current Congress government for alleged mismanagement. Thakur highlighted a court order to attach Himachal Bhavan in Delhi over unpaid bills as evidence of the government's failures.115439306CM Sukhu reacts to HC attaching Himachal Bhawan in Delhi; BJP blames govts 'financial mismanagement'The Himachal Pradesh High Court's order to attach Himachal Bhawan in Delhi over unpaid electricity bills has sparked controversy. Chief Minister Sukhvinder Singh Sukhu stated he is yet to review the order, while the BJP criticized the government's financial management. Former CM Jairam Thakur expressed concern over potential asset auctions due to the mounting financial crisis.115440374Priyanka Gandhi thanks 'two jewels' in Wayanad bypoll victory statement - Who are Raihan and Miraya?Priyanka Gandhi Vadra secured a landslide victory in the Wayanad Lok Sabha bypoll, expressing gratitude to the people and her family, including her children, Raihan and Miraya. While Raihan is a visual artist and curator, Miraya, though largely away from the spotlight, has shown support for her family's political endeavors.115606419
